starter_pack_ingestion.name: notion_pull_starter_pack
starter_pack_ingestion.description: Fetches starter pack page from Notion and converts blocks to markdown; writes _starter_pack_ref.md to module dir

starter_pack_ingestion.name: phase_splitter
starter_pack_ingestion.description: Splits starter pack markdown by section heading into warmup/lesson/exitcheck/synthesis .md files

starter_pack_ingestion.name: starter_pack_json_loader
starter_pack_ingestion.description: Extracts structured module metadata from _starter_pack_ref.md â€” deterministic first, Claude fallback for missing fields

starter_pack_ingestion_from_ref.name: phase_splitter
starter_pack_ingestion_from_ref.description: Splits starter pack markdown by section heading into warmup/lesson/exitcheck/synthesis .md files

starter_pack_ingestion_from_ref.name: starter_pack_json_loader
starter_pack_ingestion_from_ref.description: Extracts structured module metadata from _starter_pack_ref.md â€” deterministic first, Claude fallback for missing fields

lesson_generator.name: lesson_generator
lesson_generator.description: Converts lesson spec into section JSON objects following the lesson script schema

lesson_generator.name: remediation_filter
lesson_generator.description: Filters sections array to only those with real prompts â€” skips transitions and dialogue-only sections

lesson_generator.name: remediation_generator
lesson_generator.description: Generates incorrect validator states (L/M/H) for each prompt in a section

lesson_generator.name: remediation_merger
lesson_generator.description: Merges {id, incorrects} items back into full section objects to produce final lesson_sections.json

warmup_generator.name: warmup_generator
warmup_generator.description: Converts warmup spec into section JSON objects following the lesson script schema

warmup_generator.name: remediation_filter
warmup_generator.description: Filters sections array to only those with real prompts â€” skips transitions and dialogue-only sections

warmup_generator.name: remediation_generator
warmup_generator.description: Generates incorrect validator states (L/M/H) for each prompt in a section

warmup_generator.name: remediation_merger
warmup_generator.description: Merges {id, incorrects} items back into full section objects to produce final warmup_sections.json

exitcheck_generator.name: exitcheck_generator
exitcheck_generator.description: Converts exit check spec into section JSON objects following the lesson script schema

exitcheck_generator.name: remediation_filter
exitcheck_generator.description: Filters sections array to only those with real prompts â€” skips transitions and dialogue-only sections

exitcheck_generator.name: remediation_generator
exitcheck_generator.description: Generates incorrect validator states (L/M/H) for each prompt in a section

exitcheck_generator.name: remediation_merger
exitcheck_generator.description: Merges {id, incorrects} items back into full section objects to produce final exitcheck_sections.json

synthesis_generator.name: synthesis_generator

synthesis_generator.name: remediation_filter

synthesis_generator.name: remediation_merger

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: spec_splitter
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Splits lesson.md into one item per interaction/section â€” deterministic, no AI

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: starterpack_parser
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Extracts fields and generates ID for each pre-split section â€” one Claude call per section

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: toy_spec_loader
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Scans structured spec for toy types, loads matching spec files, outputs enriched_spec.json

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: glossary_drift_checker
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Scans enriched spec for terms not in canonical glossary; writes drift_report.md as a side effect

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: lesson_generator
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Converts enriched spec into section JSON objects â€” functional dialogue only, no voice enhancement
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.batch_continuous_summary_prompt:
You are summarizing a structured lesson section for use as context by subsequent sections. Given the section JSON below, write a concise summary (3-6 sentences) covering:
1. VISUAL STATE: What tangibles are on screen at section end? For each, include: type, dataset name, all category names with their exact values, scale, orientation, mode.
2. CONTENT: What concept or skill was introduced or practiced? Any vocabulary formally introduced?
3. STUDENT ACTION: What interaction did the student perform (e.g. built a graph, answered MC, filled slots)?
Be specific with all numbers — list every category value explicitly. This summary accumulates into a reference document that subsequent sections use to resolve vague visual references and understand prior content.

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: id_stamper
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Converts steps from array-of-arrays to step-objects and stamps stable step/beat IDs

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: dialogue_extractor
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Pre-extracts dialogue beats with context labels (lesson/on_correct) before AI rewriting

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: dialogue_rewriter
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Rewrites all dialogue beats in each section to improve voice, warmth, and naturalness

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: dialogue_merger
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Merges rewritten dialogue texts back into full section objects positionally

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: remediation_filter
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Filters sections array to only those with real prompts â€” skips transitions and dialogue-only sections

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: remediation_generator
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Generates incorrect validator states (L/M/H) for each prompt in a section

lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.name: remediation_merger
lesson_generator_dialogue_pass.description: Merges {id, incorrects} items back into full section objects; stamps validator-state beat IDs

problem_pool_generator.name: problem_generator
problem_pool_generator.description: Generates specific problem instances from a problem template

problem_pool_generator.name: sequence_structurer
problem_pool_generator.description: Transforms problem instances into structured interaction sequences

problem_pool_generator.name: step_flattener
problem_pool_generator.description: Flattens multi-step sequences into individual step items for batch processing

problem_pool_generator.name: step_combiner
problem_pool_generator.description: Combines flattened step items back into sequences with steps arrays

problem_pool_generator.name: godot_formatter
problem_pool_generator.description: Transforms interaction sequences into Godot-processable format

problem_pool_generator.name: comparison_event_tagger
problem_pool_generator.description: Prepends Godot event tags to on_correct dialogue for comparison steps

problem_pool_generator.name: benchmark_label_hider
problem_pool_generator.description: Sets is_label_visible=false on all Benchmark tangibles in workspaces

problem_pool_generator.name: add_component
problem_pool_generator.description: Adds mastery_component to metadata and component to telemetry_data

problem_pool_generator.name: numline_fixer
problem_pool_generator.description: Fix NumLine labels, ticks, alt_labels, and readonly

problem_pool_generator.name: add_empty_workspace
problem_pool_generator.description: Adds empty workspace to first step if missing

problem_pool_generator.name: sample_per_template
problem_pool_generator.description: Sample random sequences per template for production
